Latent Semantic Analysis (LSA):

Distributional Hypothesis:
 - States that words with similar meanings appear frequently together
 - Singular Value Decomposition (SVD)

SVD:
"Recreates documents into different vectors"
Each vector express a different way of the meaning in text.
"SVD is a method of dimensionality reduction"
Similarities can be identified by:
# 1 - Clusterning
# 2 - Similarity Scores
